author: @benjaminn8
summary: shopifyql funnel uses real ShopifyQL response columns, not hallucinated ones.
reason: The novel-feature shopifyql funnel command originally referenced column names (e.g. funnel_step, step_count) that do not exist in Shopify's ShopifyQL response schema, producing empty results against live data. Replacing them with the actual schema fields makes the command return real funnel rows against a live store. This lives only in this CLI's hand-coded internal/cli/shopifyql.go and is novel-feature substance, not a generator template bug.
validated_outcome: Funnel command returns real session/checkout/order counts against a live Shopify store.
